_comment: 1inch AggregationRouterV6 real mainnet swap(executor,SwapDescription,data) txs (selector 0x07ed2379) — exercises Amm::Swap on AggregatorRoute(OneInchV6) + the general keccak256 $fn for route_hash (and clipperSwap/clipperSwapTo via the address_from_uint256 $fn, P3 follow-up). Source: Etherscan txlist, AggregationRouterV6 0x111111125421ca6dc452d289314280a0f8842a65 (chain 1). Pins the policy-relevant swap envelope (token_in/out, amount_in, min_amount_out, recipient=dstReceiver); the executed route lives in opaque `data` (enrichment, not pinned). unoswap/LOP deferred (no manifest → route miss).

transactions.intent: swap ETH->token (native srcToken sentinel) — 1inch v6; ETH modeled as 0xEeee… sentinel -> TokenKey::Native via the token_key_or_native $fn (P4 follow-up)
swap token->ETH (native dstToken sentinel) — 1inch v6; ETH modeled as 0xEeee… sentinel -> TokenKey::Native via the token_key_or_native $fn (P4 follow-up)
clipperSwap DAI->USDC (Clipper MM; srcToken=packed AddressLib uint256 unmasked via address_from_uint256 $fn; recipient=msg.sender=$tx.from)
clipperSwapTo WETH->DAI (Clipper MM with explicit recipient; srcToken=packed AddressLib uint256 unmasked via address_from_uint256 $fn)
1inch LOP v4 cancelOrder (maker on-chain) -> Amm::CancelIntentOrder on OneInchLimitOrder venue
1inch LOP v4 cancelOrders (maker batch) -> array_emit Amm::CancelIntentOrder per orderHash (2 actions, multicall envelope)

1inch LOP v4 Order sign (off-chain EIP-712, maker) -> Amm::SignIntentOrder; real Order from fillOrder 0xb4d057de; receiver=0 -> recipient=maker (coalesce_address $fn); valid_until from makerTraits (maker_traits_expiry $fn)
1inch NativeOrderFactory.create — on-chain native limit order open (WETH sell -> USDT buy); on-chain twin of order-sign, AddressLib-packed Order fields -> address_from_uint256
unoswap WETH->? direct swap (exact_input, 1inch v6 AggregationRouterV6; token_out omitted — pool token0/token1 read needed)
ethUnoswap ETH->? native-in direct swap (exact_input, 1inch v6 AggregationRouterV6; amount_in = msg.value; token_out omitted — pool read needed)
1inch PowerPod delegate(delegatee) -> Permission::ProtocolAuthorization{permission=delegate}; staker delegates Unicorn Power (C-audit gap)
